text: Iraq-Iran: Iraqi military forces, including tank, artillery, and air force units, have been ordered to prepare for exercises with live ammunition in two areas along the Iranian border--near Khaniqin, 100 miles northeast of Baghdad, and along the Shatt al-Arab River near Basra. This move appears to be a reaction to the arrival of Iranian reinforcements in the Abadan-Khorramshahr area. These exercises will add to the tension between Iran and Iraq and increase the likelihood of incidents between the opposing forces
